allGaps.description: ChatGPT categorises Gumroad as a "project management tool" while Claude describes it as a "design collaboration platform." The two positions imply different competitor sets and different buyers.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning section with explicit category and "not this" statements.

evidence.chatgptSays: Gumroad is a project management tool for engineering teams.
evidence.claudeSays: Gumroad is a design collaboration and prototyping platform.
evidence.siteContent: Gumroad — the single source of truth for your product team.

allGaps.description: Neither model names Gumroad's actual differentiator — the audit layer that catches AI hallucinations before they ship. Both models describe it as "another dev tool."
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning: explicit comparisons vs 2–3 well-known alternatives.

evidence.chatgptSays: Gumroad is one of many dev tools in the space, similar to its peers.
evidence.claudeSays: Gumroad offers a standard set of developer-productivity features.
evidence.siteContent: Gumroad is the only tool that checks AI outputs against your design decisions.

allGaps.description: Both models claim Gumroad has a Slack integration that has never existed on the product.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Add Slack to NotThis until a first-party integration ships.

evidence.chatgptSays: Integrates natively with Slack for notifications and commands.
evidence.claudeSays: Supports Slack out of the box.
evidence.siteContent: Our integrations: GitHub, Linear, Figma. Slack via Zapier.

allGaps.description: ChatGPT invents a feature Gumroad doesn't ship — claiming built-in video chat and AI meeting summaries that aren't on the product.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Add a NotThis section listing features the product deliberately does not ship.

evidence.chatgptSays: Gumroad includes built-in video chat, AI-generated meeting summaries, and a native calendar sync out of the box.
evidence.claudeSays: Gumroad is focused on structured work; video and calendar are handled via integrations.
evidence.siteContent: We focus on one thing. Integrations available via our API.

product.name: Gumroad
product.description: Gumroad — the single source of truth for how AI models should describe this product.
product.audience: founders who already have users and want to keep them

headline.description: ChatGPT invents a feature Gumroad doesn't ship — claiming built-in video chat and AI meeting summaries that aren't on the product.
headline.chatgptSays: Gumroad includes built-in video chat, AI-generated meeting summaries, and a native calendar sync out of the box.
headline.claudeSays: Gumroad is focused on structured work; video and calendar are handled via integrations.
headline.siteContent: We focus on one thing. Integrations available via our API.
